Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: accessories by location on the legs or feet [300211599], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: equestrian armors [300210832], tournament armors [300210831], armors by function [300224810], armors (object groupings) [300226591], armor groupings [300241516], costume groupings [300210821], object groupings by specific context [300241512], object groupings [300241507], Object Groupings and Systems (hierarchy name) [300241489], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Metal goads attached to a rider's boot heels, used to drive the horse on.
Puya de metal adherida a los talones de las botas del jinete, utilizada para conducir a los caballos.
Metalen drijvers die zijn bevestigd aan de hielen van de laarzen van de rijder en die worden gebruikt om het paard aan te drijven.
Metallener Stachel, der am Stiefelabsatz eines Reiters befestigt ist und der dazu verwendet wird, das Pferd anzutreiben.
Tepoztli tenyacahuitztic tlen motlalhuiliah ininicxican pan inintecac tlen baqueroz, motequihuia para quitohtomotzazceh cahuayohmeh.

Source.Source_ID: 2000000221/Edge and Paddock, Arms and Armor of the Medieval Knight (1988)
